sections.paragraph: adj. straight, right, pr. used of a way going straight on (Germ. gerade aus). Isa 57:2, הֹלֵךְ נְכֹחֹו “he who walks in a straight way” (der gerade aus geht), i.e. an upright man; hence metaph. upright, just, Pro 8:9. Fem. נְכֹחָה “that which is just and proper.” Amo 3:10 Isa 59:14 plur. נְכֹחֹות id. Isa 26:10 30:10 .
